title: hieracium kuekenthalianum subsp. brachypogon
intro: Hieracium kuekenthalianum subsp. brachypogon, also known as the Hawkweed, is a subspecies of plant belonging to the dandelion-like flowering plant family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin irritations, and supporting liver health. The herbal preparations of Hieracium kuekenthalianum subsp. brachypogon include tea infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
